description: Email tells readers to reply to invest and DM the team — anti-hawking violation, should fail ADV-003.
text:
FarmThru community,

We're opening our crowd-sourced funding round on 23 June 2026. To make it easy for early supporters, we're taking expressions of interest directly:

Reply to this email to apply for shares in the round. Or DM us on Instagram to invest — Sarah personally walks every early backer through the process. Prefer a phone call? Call us to invest and we'll lock in your allocation.

We want our day-one shareholders to be the people who already buy from us. That's you.

Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
